The '''Silken Asteroids''' was a [[Asteroid field/Legends|field]] of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in a [[Silken system/Legends|system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].

==Description==
The Silken Asteroids was a field of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in a system governed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derliff]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] at [[Galactic coordinates/Legends|coordinates]] O-20.<ref name="EA Online" /> The area containing the Silken Asteroids was governed by Moff Derliff during the first [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The asteroids were rocky and were without [[Water/Legends|water]]. [[Mynock/Legends|Mynocks]] were found in the field.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==History==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] established a minor base on an asteroid with a thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] around<ref name="SW:GB" /> [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="Time">"Early days of the Rebellion" is around 2 BBY, according to the ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> but it was [[Battle in the Silken Asteroids|discovered]] by [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] belonging to Moff Derliff. The Rebel base's [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] held off Derliff's initial attack and Dodonna rallied the base's forces to attack Derliff's base and drove away the Imperials.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Silken Asteroids was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It was the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia campaign's challenge mission. The mission and thus the asteroid field was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
